title: nasturtium armoracia
intro: Nasturtium armoracia, also known as horseradish, is a root vegetable plant with a pungent flavor and aroma, belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. Horseradish root has various health benefits, such as reducing congestion and sinus pressure, aiding digestion, and providing antioxidant properties. Horseradish can be prepared in various herbal forms, including fresh root, dried root, oil extracts, and capsules, which can be used in cooking, as a condiment, or taken as a dietary supplement.
